## Summary

<!-- What changed and why (one short paragraph). -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature or API
- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Refactor (no intended behavior change)
- [ ] Dependency or tooling

## Implementation notes

<!-- Optional: design decisions, trade-offs, or follow-ups. -->

## Testing

- [ ] `pnpm run typecheck`
- [ ] `pnpm run build`

## Changelog

- [ ] Not needed / N/A
- [ ] Draft under `## [Unreleased]` in `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-facing or notable)

## Checklist

- [ ] PR targets **`main`**
- [ ] **Verify** workflow green before merge

## Screenshots / recordings

<!-- If the PR affects UI, attach before/after or app screenshots. Otherwise delete this section. -->
